message:
feat(runtime): add runtime-wide quiescence query API (bd-ttaq)

Add asx_runtime_is_quiescent() public API implementing the documented
five-conjunct runtime-wide quiescence contract:
1. No live (non-terminal) tasks
2. No RESERVED obligations
3. No active I/O registrations
4. No pending region cleanup/finalizers
5. All regions closed

Add focused unit tests covering NULL/uninitialized runtime, clean init,
open region, live task, pending obligation, pending cleanup, and active
I/O cases.

Work by FuchsiaHare (bd-ttaq). All gates pass.

Guarantee Impact Block:
- gs_id: GS-008
- change: New public API asx_runtime_is_quiescent() on runtime surface.
  No existing API behavior changed.
- preserved invariants: All existing runtime semantics unchanged. New API
  is read-only query against existing runtime state counters. Deterministic
  scheduling, replay identity, and semantic digest stability preserved.
- proof artifacts: tests/unit/runtime/test_rt.c, tests/e2e/e2e_core_lifecycle.c
- fallback mode: Remove asx_runtime_is_quiescent declaration and
  implementation to restore prior state.
- deterministic isomorphism note: Read-only query function; no state
  mutation, no scheduling effect, no digest change.
- semantic delta budget: 0
- traceability refs: TRC-SEM-001, TRC-QUIESCENCE-001
- artifact links: build/tests/unit/runtime/, tools/ci/artifacts/conformance/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
